  1. PGFPlotsX
  2. backend

pgf backend

0.1 Packages

import Pkg; Pkg.add("PGFPlotsX")
using Plots, PGFPlotsX, LaTeXStrings

1 pgfplotsx backend

Uses Plots syntax with pgfplotsx backend engine.

1.1 Polynomial function

# normal plot(x,y)

pgfplotsx()
x1 = range(-2,2,length=50)
y1 = x1.^3
plot(x1,y1, framestyle=:origin, leg=false, 
     size=(300,250),lw=2,linecolor=:black)

1.2 Recipe: Scatter

# recipe scatter(x,y)

x2 = [2,3,3.5,4,4.5,5]
y2 = [3.5,5,4,6,4.5,5.5]
scatter(x2,y2, leg=false, size=(300,250), 
        framestyle=:origin)

1.3 Expression

@pgf Axis(
    {
        xlabel = L"x",
        ylabel = L"y"
    },
    Plot3(
        Expression("-x/6+y/2")
    )
)

1.4 surface

surface(range(-3,3, length=30), 
        range(-3,3, length=30),
        (x, y) -> x^2-y^2,
        label=L"x^2-y^2",
        colormap_name = "viridis",
        size=(400,300),
        colorbar=false)
pgfplotsx
3D
